title: Classifying Plant Species by Leaf Structure
scenario: Create a prompt that will help a bot classify plant species based on their leaf structures using a pre-trained model. The input will be a description of the leaf (e.g., 'oval-shaped, serrated edges, 5-7 lobes'). The output should include the plant species name and a confidence score. The output must be in markdown format and have at most 50 characters for the species name. The prompt must be in a style that a bot can understand and execute without further explanation. The classification model should have a high accuracy rate for deciduous trees.
constraints: Must use the classification model's API

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Is the classification model used accurate for deciduous trees?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Can the bot understand and execute the prompt without further explanation?
